svg.title: Hybrid CNN fusion project workflow
svg.desc: A top-down flowchart showing the 15-day project workflow from setup through baselines, fusion, explainability, documentation, and polish phases with task dependencies and deliverables.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Break down the Setup phase tasks in detail')
sendPrompt('Break down the repo and pipeline setup tasks')
sendPrompt('Break down the stratified split and EDA tasks')
sendPrompt('Break down the VGG16 training phase')
sendPrompt('Break down the evaluation and logging tasks')
sendPrompt('Break down the ResNet50 and EfficientNet training')
sendPrompt('Break down the feature extraction step')
sendPrompt('Break down the fusion concatenation and classifier training')
sendPrompt('Break down the fusion evaluation step')
sendPrompt('Break down the Grad-CAM generation tasks')
sendPrompt('Break down the attention pattern comparison')
sendPrompt('Break down the README and documentation tasks')
sendPrompt('Break down the code refactoring tasks')
sendPrompt('Break down the stretch goal options')
sendPrompt('Break down the Streamlit dashboard stretch goal')

svg.text: Risk mitigation: each phase produces standalone deliverables.
Days 1–7 alone = complete 3-model comparison portfolio piece.
